module.title: Security checker
module.description: CheckSecurity checks host security posture: certificate expiry and (on Windows) the firewall profile state.
module.name: CheckSecurity

commands.check_certificate: Check X.509 certificate expiry/validity/hygiene from files (all platforms) or the Windows certificate store.
commands.check_firewall: Check the Windows firewall profile (Domain/Private/Public) enabled state. Windows only.
commands.check_users: Check the count and detail of logged-on / RDP sessions (Windows and Linux).
commands.check_nla: Check the Network Location Awareness profile (public/private/domain) per network. Windows only.
commands.check_antivirus: Check registered antivirus products' enabled/up-to-date state (Windows Security Center). Windows only.
commands.check_bitlocker: Check BitLocker drive-encryption protection status per volume. Windows only.
commands.check_secureboot: Check whether UEFI Secure Boot is enabled. Windows only.
commands.check_defender: Check Microsoft Defender status: signature/scan age, real-time and tamper protection, engine/signature versions. Windows only.
commands.check_local_accounts: Check local user account hygiene: enabled/disabled, locked, password-required/expires, built-in admin/guest. Windows only.
commands.check_group_members: Check local group membership (default Administrators) and alert on members not on an expected allow-list. Windows only.
